parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.metadata?.chatId, text: $json.messageText, parse_mode: 'HTML', reply_to_message_id: parseInt($json.messageId) || undefined }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, response: $json.messageText, source: $json.source, version: '1.0.0' }) }}
